title: hieracium bicolor subsp. luzicola
intro: Hieracium bicolor subsp. luzicola, also known as the Hieracium luzicola, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family, native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium bicolor subsp. luzicola include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of various conditions, such as digestive issues and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing its leaves and flowers in hot water, and it is often used as a tea or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
